examples: Therefore, the foraminiferal taphocoenoses in the study area are the combined product of ecological and taphonomic factors of the environment.
Jian Xu, 2004. Quaternary Planktonic Foraminiferal Assemblages in the Southern South China Sea and Paleoclimatic Variations. Tongji University, Shanghai.
Since China has joined such deep-sea research programs as IODP, some new directions in benthic foraminiferal studies are proposed to the Chinese community.
